C:\msys64\mingw64\bin\arm-none-eabi-gcc.exe -mcpu=cortex-m33 -mthumb -march=armv8-m.main+fp+dsp -mfloat-abi=softfp -mcmse -g -Os -DNDEBUG -Wl,--build-id=none --specs=nosys.specs -nostartfiles -Wl,--script=C:/msys64/home/Q/pico-sdk/src/rp2350/boot_stage2/boot_stage2.ld -Wl,-Map=C:/msys64/home/Q/thumbycolordoom/build_blink/pico-sdk/src/rp2350/boot_stage2/bs2_default.elf.map CMakeFiles/bs2_default.dir/compile_time_choice.S.obj -o bs2_default.elf
